verses.1: I waited patiently for the LORD.
verses.2: He brought me up also out of a horrible pit,
verses.3: He has put a new song in my mouth, even praise to our God.
verses.4: Blessed is the man who makes the LORD his trust,
verses.5: Many, LORD, my God, are the wonderful works which you have done,
verses.6: Sacrifice and offering you didn’t desire.
verses.7: Then I said, “Behold, I have come.
verses.8: I delight to do your will, my God.
verses.9: I have proclaimed glad news of righteousness in the great assembly.
verses.10: I have not hidden your righteousness within my heart.
verses.11: Don’t withhold your tender mercies from me, LORD.
verses.12: For innumerable evils have surrounded me.
verses.13: Be pleased, LORD, to deliver me.
verses.14: Let them be disappointed and confounded together who seek after my soul to destroy it.
verses.15: Let them be desolate by reason of their shame that tell me, “Aha! Aha!”
verses.16: Let all those who seek you rejoice and be glad in you.
verses.17: But I am poor and needy.
